name: v11-hype-bot
description: A Slack hype-man bot for the V11 founder-builder community. Reacts to every new message with an emoji and a genuinely positive, AI-generated reply.

scripts.deploy:code: npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund && rm -f /tmp/v11-hype-bot.zip && zip -rq /tmp/v11-hype-bot.zip src node_modules package.json && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name v11-hype-bot --zip-file fileb:///tmp/v11-hype-bot.zip --no-cli-pager && aws lambda wait function-updated --function-name v11-hype-bot && echo 'deployed to v11-hype-bot'
